productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Black Shoes
description: Style NoteEncapsulating summer style in their sleek, lightweight shoe, united colors of benetton have come up with yet another great lifestyle shoe. Hitting high octane fashion notes, this shoe is sophisticated enough to be styled with your blazer-and-denims combo. Add a elegant finishing polish to your jeans and tee staple with this ucb pair! Product DetailsBlunt toed, casual sneaker in black with an upraised heel and lace-up fasteningSynthetic leather upper with perforated synthetic overlaysPadded collar and tongue (with branding) and an ergonomically shaped insoleRubber midsoleTPU outsole with grooves and an upraised heelOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel to act as a heel guardMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in sunlight
